info.english_meaning: to throb to pulse to move to palpitate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: calane ' iti nyAse (6.1.47)  evaM kzIrasvAmyapi  ' sPara ityeke ' iti mADavaH  ' sPuraRe saYcalane dIptO ca ' iti mEtreyaH  ' sPUrtO cale ' iti vopadevaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sahasraM DArA draviraRasya meM duhAM Druveva DenuranapasPurantI (aTarva॰12.1.45) apasPurantI=sahasodvijamAnA dogDuH sakASAdekapade pravicalantI
'apasPuraM gfBAyata somamindrAya pAtave' (f0 96910) apasPuramucCalantam utsicyamAnaM nizpatantam ativfdDamiti tu sAyaRaH sa ca SabdamayadiyA durlaBo'rTaH
'nadantaM visPurantaM ca paSumAramamArayat' (BA0 sOptika0 819) visPurantaM vicezwamAnam
'kiM nAma visPuranti SastrARi' (uttara0 4) cakAsati unmayUKAni Bavanti
'muKena visPUrya suvIrarAzwrapaM tato'bravIttaM drupadAtmajA punaH' (BA0 vana0 2681) visPUrya PUtkAraM kftvA
'ArtnI ime vizPurantI amitrAn sPurati rvaDakarmA vizPurantyO niGnatyO' (ni0 940) nigadavyAKyAtam viSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI
'akzARAM hfdayaM me jyAM raTaM vidDi mamAsPuram' (BA0 saBA0 564) AsPuram akzanyAsapAtanAdisTAnam
